title: Estate: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Estate connects discerning buyers with the finest residences, from coastal villas to penthouse skylines, with discretion and care.
Every property is hand-selected and every detail considered, so your search stays effortless from first tour to final key.
cards: A private collection of homes you will not find on open markets.
Addresses chosen for views, privacy and lasting value.
Confidential viewings and protected client information at every step.
Film-quality walkthroughs and drone footage of every residence.
One dedicated expert who knows your taste and your timeline.
Clear, data-backed pricing so you always negotiate with confidence.

sections.text: We learn what moves you, then surface residences that match before they ever reach the public market.
bullets: A shortlist tailored to your taste

sections.text: From the first offer to the final signature, our team manages the detail so the experience stays calm and considered.

sections.sub: A simple path to a home you will love for years.
steps: Tell us your style, budget and the life you picture.
Visit a curated shortlist at times that suit you.
We handle the paperwork while you plan the housewarming.

sections.quote: Estate found us a villa that was never publicly listed, then handled the entire purchase flawlessly. We simply showed up with the keys waiting.
sections.author: Sample Client

sections.sub: Choose the level of service that fits your move.

items: Yes. Signature and Private Office clients see residences before they are ever publicly listed.
Buyers search at no obligation. On a sale we charge a clear percentage agreed in advance, with no hidden costs.
Our Private Office includes a concierge who arranges schools, movers and local introductions.
Always. Viewings and client details are handled with strict confidentiality at every stage.
Through our partner network we source and sell luxury homes across major cities and coastlines.

sections.sub: Tell us what you are looking for and we will open the right doors, privately and on your schedule.

sections.tagline: Curated luxury residences with discretion and care. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Estate is a sample template with dummy content
